basic_details.job_title: SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 Doctor, Ward Boy and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Doctor, Ward Boy and More Posts Posts
basic_details.short_information: SVRR Government General Hospital, Tirupati (SVRR GGH Tirupati) Doctor, Ward Boy and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Doctor (full time): MBBS with registration of Medical Council/Medical Commission along with should undergo training arranged by the MOSJE NISD with in three months of joining the IRCA. Project Co-ordinator cum Vocational Counselor: Graduate with experience of managing such centers for a minimum period of 3 years or demonstrable capability for running such centers and having working knowledge of computers. Ward Boy: 8th class pass preferably experienced in such centers Ward Boy employed in an IRCA must be trained by NISD new recruitment i.e., future recruitment. Experience of working in Hospitals/ Health Care centers/ De-Addiction centers. Counselor/ Social Worker/ Psychologist: Graduate in any discipline with three years' experience in the field. He/ She must hold a Certificate of three months Training course in de-addiction counseling by NISD and should have knowledge of English as well as one regional language. For New Recruitment (i.e. future recruitment): Graduate in social sciences preferably in Social Work/ Psychology with 1-2 year's experience in the field and should have knowledge of English as well as one regional language. Preference shall be given to the person holding a Certificate of Training Course in de-addition counseling for recognized institution. Peer Educator: Should be literate: Ex-drug user with 1-2 years of sobriety, willing to work among drug using population and having communication skills. Agrees to refrain from using buying or selling drugs, ready to work for the prevention of harmful drug use and relapse. Chowkidars: SSC House Keeping Worker: SSC Yoga Therapist/Dance /Music/Art Teacher: Possessing experience of at least three years in the discipline

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue with all required documents well before the scheduled time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for various posts in the SVRR Government General Hospital, Tirupati recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the posts in SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 5000/- to Rs. 60000/- per month, depending on the specific post and its requirements.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Doctor (full time) post?
faq.answer: For the Doctor (full time) post, candidates need an MBBS degree with a valid Medical Council/Medical Commission registration and must undergo training arranged by MOSJE NISD within three months of joining.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any specific requirements for the Ward Boy post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Ward Boy post, candidates should have passed 8th class and preferably have experience in hospitals, health care centers, or de-addiction centers. Training by NISD is also mentioned for future recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates do not need to apply online; they can directly attend the interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the SVRR Government General Hospital, Tirupati located?
faq.answer: SVRR Government General Hospital is located in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SVRR GGH Tirupati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue with all required documents well before the scheduled time.
